title: Set Of 2 Oval Shape Oil Burners - Melt Burner Ceramic Essential | Love Decor Pattern Granules Melt Wax Scented Diffuser Warmer | Home Bedroom Holder Candle Aromatherapy Fragrance Set Aroma Tart
features: ✔️ ORNATE BURNERS - Ceramic Oil Burners are a gorgeous addition to any home. Light a tea light and relax in the ambience of your home filled with relaxing aromas.
✔️ SET OF 2 OIL BURNERS - 11CM (H) X 9CM (W) If you’re looking for unusual perfect gift idea, you can use this burner with a creative design that can be used for a truly thoughtful present.

✔️ VERSATILE OIL BURNER HOLDER - suitable for home decoration, spa yoga meditation, kitchen, party night, reading, and home fragrance. The burning time of essential oil/aromatherapy wax lasts longer, giving you hours of fragrance

✔️ DESIGN - Catching the eyes of everybody who pass by in Day, It's a Good Choice for home and office decoration; Amazing nocturnal effect, beautiful and bright enough, It's no doubt the Lead-Role of the Night!
✔️ OILS OR WAX - Whether you’re a lover of sweeter scents or prefer something more natural, the ceramic oil burners can be used for both oil and wax scents.
